channel.title: 番剧每日新闻RSS
channel.description: 自动聚合：新番、定档、PV、STAFF、CAST、延期资讯 | Auto-updated anime news aggregator

item.title: [公开] Anime News Network Mononoke Franchise 公开 新作 Project Featuring 新作 Medicine Seller
item.description: Mononoke stage plays' star Hirofumi Araki voices new Medicine Seller "Ken no Tsurugi" ― Twin Engine revealed on Sunday in a promotional video that a new Mononoke project has started, and introduced... | 来源: ANN | 原文: Mononoke Franchise Reveals New Project Featuring New Medicine Seller
